hypotheses.name: SV1 gene loading direction stability across layers
hypotheses.method: SVD of centered nonzero-only embeddings (n=2039, 512-dim) at each of 12 layers. Extract left singular vector U[:,0] (gene loading on SV1). Compute absolute cosine similarity between consecutive layers and vs. L0. Bootstrap null: permute gene order in SV1 vector (200 rounds).
hypotheses.next_action: Characterize what genes rotate most in SV1 between L0 and L11 (top movers); correlate with layer-specific SV1 enrichment functions

hypotheses.name: SWD vs feature-shuffle null comparison
hypotheses.method: Sliced Wasserstein distance (50 random projections) between consecutive nonzero-gene layers (n=2039). Feature-shuffle null: independently permute each of 512 dimensions per layer. Paired t-test between real and null SWD.
hypotheses.next_action: Test additional nulls (random rotation null, Gaussian null) to confirm specificity; identify which layer transitions exceed null most consistently

hypotheses.name: SV2-SV4 subspace encodes TRRUST TF-target regulatory proximity
hypotheses.method: At each layer, compute SVD of centered nonzero embeddings. Project genes to SV2-SV4 3D subspace using gene loading coordinates (left singular vectors). Compute Euclidean distances between TRRUST TF-target positive pairs (n=295 named genes, matched to 361-gene edge dataset) vs. negative pairs (n=880). Mann-Whitney U test (alternative=less). Also tested SV1 alone and SV1-SV4 combined.
hypotheses.result_value: Best: L8 p<0.0001 effect=0.268; significant (p<0.05) at 8/12 layers (L3,4,5,6,7,8,9,11)
hypotheses.next_action: Replicate with full gene vocabulary (requires recovering adata var_names); test SV5-SV10 range; validate at seed replicates; compute FDR-corrected p-values across layers
